# Task 7: .env Template Generator
# Date: 2026-02-26 01:14 UTC

## lib/env.sh shellcheck:
PASS

## Generated .env.template contents:
# oh-my-longfor Environment Variables
# Generated by oml on 2026-02-26 01:14 UTC
#
# USAGE:
#   1. Copy this file: cp ~/.oml/env/.env.template ~/.env.oml
#   2. Fill in your values in ~/.env.oml
#   3. Add to your shell rc: [ -f ~/.env.oml ] && source ~/.env.oml
#
# Run 'oml env' to check which variables are set.

# ─── Required ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Context7 API key for documentation MCP. Get from https://context7.com/settings (free tier available)
CONTEXT7_API_KEY=

# Sentry authentication token for error tracking MCP. Create at https://sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens/
SENTRY_TOKEN=

# GitHub personal access token for GitHub MCP and private skill repos. Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope
GITHUB_TOKEN=

# ─── Optional ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Linear API key for project management MCP. Get from https://linear.app/settings/api
LINEAR_API_KEY=

# Slack Bot OAuth token for Slack MCP. Create a Slack App at https://api.slack.com/apps
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=

# OpenAI API key for GPT-4 model access in oracle agent. Get from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
OPENAI_API_KEY=

# Anthropic API key for Claude model access. Get from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=

## No actual values present (all = sign followed by nothing):
6
vars with empty values

## Descriptions present as comments:
18
comment lines

## RESULT: PASS
